productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Bavarian Black Flip Flop
description: Get ready for that long overdue trip to the beautiful woodlands. lotto brings to you Bavarian, the perfect floater for your trip. Soft and cushy, the slippers help relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait in style.Upper Fabric thong straps for lightweight durability and better Fit Comfortable toe separator Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for soft feel and maximum comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for good grip on all surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRub surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
